note: Model roster for the animgen tool. Replicate IDs + field mappings verified by TRACK_B's live schema fetch (2026-06-10); cost_per_second_usd from the billing-verified cost rule. Replicate per-parameter schemas are fetched live at edit time, so only canonical metadata lives here. Local (comfyui) entries point at a workflow template under ../workflows.
default_negative_prompt: camera pan, camera zoom, dolly, tracking shot, scene change, background change, new background, realistic, photorealistic, 3D render, blurry, extra limbs, deformed hands, text, watermark, frozen, still image, static pose

models.notes: Hero/production tier. MUST set aspect_ratio=1:1 or it defaults 16:9 and stretches/clips. Camera is stochastic (seed lottery). Two-part prompts soak duration padding. A tier/resolution change is a choreography REROLL, not an upgrade.
Cheap choreography auditions only. Validates prompt/staging; never the final frame source (tier change = reroll). Fast-tier bg shimmer is keyed out.

Best lane: single short airborne/structural actions. Files API unsupported -> data-uri REQUIRED (images < ~250KB: flatten bg to magenta, then quantize). Short durations fix bg pulsing. Never pack multiple moves (its lever is duration).
Strong prompt adherence, fast. Resolution defaults 1080p - set 720p. Duration is an enum (4/6/8s). No 1:1 aspect on Replicate; test aspect 'auto'.
Cheap filler / prototyping (quality ~animation-student). Resolution defaults 1080p - set 720p. Two-part prompts help padding. 'audio' is a URL string, not a boolean toggle.
Stable backgrounds but low-fps cadence and invents actions (retired by human verdict). mode default=pro; set 'standard' for cheaper. Kept available for one-off comparisons.

Free local tween factory: end-pinned keypose A/B -> 1-2 usable fast mid frames (held frames stay hero-art keyposes). ~3 min/render. ComfyUI must run on 127.0.0.1:8188. Best for transitions: stand<->crouch, hurt snap/recovery, block flinch. Template node ids match the FLF_*.json family.
Free local 2-4 keypose interpolation; pins must land on 4k+1 frame boundaries. Built per-job via scripts/make_vace_workflow.py. Rough quality - last resort vs FLF.
